Package com.team81

Class BobaShopGUI

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window
          • java.awt.Frame
            • javax.swing.JFrame
              • com.team81.BobaShopGUI
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible, javax.swing.RootPaneContainer, javax.swing.WindowConstants
    public class BobaShopGUI
extends javax.swing.JFrame
    Main GUI application for the Team 81 Boba Shop Point-of-Sale (POS) system. <<<<<<< Updated upstream Provides a cashier interface for order entry, manager views for trends and reports, and management panels for menu items, inventory, and employees. Uses a CardLayout to switch between different views.
    ======= Provides a cashier ordering interface, manager trend views, reporting (X-Report, Z-Report, product usage, and sales), and CRUD management screens for menu items, inventory, and employees. Uses a CardLayout to switch between views and connects to a PostgreSQL database via DatabaseManager.
>>>>>>> Stashed changes
See Also:
Serialized Form

      private static class  BobaShopGUI.CartItem <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Represents a single item in the shopping cart with a name, unit price, and quantity.
      =======
      Simple data holder representing a single item in the cashier's shopping cart.

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private static java.awt.Color BG_LIGHT 
      Light background colour for content panels.
      private static java.awt.Color BLUE_DARK 
      Darker blue used for hover/pressed states of blue buttons.
      private static java.awt.Color BLUE_PRIMARY 
      Primary blue colour used for secondary action buttons.
      private static java.awt.Font BUTTON_FONT 
      Font used for styled action buttons.
      private java.awt.CardLayout cardLayout 
      Layout manager that controls which view panel is currently displayed.
      private java.util.ArrayList<BobaShopGUI.CartItem> cart 
      In-memory list of items currently in the cashier's cart.
      private javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel cartTableModel 
      Table model backing the shopping cart table in the cashier view.
      private java.sql.Connection db 
      Active JDBC connection to the PostgreSQL database.
      private javax.swing.JPanel drinksGrid 
      Grid panel that holds the dynamically-loaded menu item buttons.
      private static java.awt.Color GREEN_DARK 
      Darker green used for hover/pressed states of green buttons.
      private static java.awt.Color GREEN_PRIMARY 
      Primary green colour used for header backgrounds and action buttons.
      private static java.awt.Font HEADER_FONT 
      Font used for page header titles.
      private static java.awt.Font LABEL_FONT 
      Font used for section labels.
      private javax.swing.JPanel mainPanel 
      Container panel managed by cardLayout.
      private int nextOrderId 
      Auto-incrementing order ID, loaded from the database on startup.
      private javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel reportTableModel 
      Table model used by the reports view to display generated report data.
      private javax.swing.JLabel totalLabel 
      Label that displays the running total dollar amount of the cart.
      private javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel trendsDailyModel 
      Table model for daily ordering trend data, refreshable from the Trends view.
      private javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel trendsHourlyModel 
      Table model for hourly ordering trend data, refreshable from the Trends view.

      BobaShopGUI() <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Constructs the main Boba Shop POS window.
      =======
      Constructs the main POS window, initialises the database connection, builds all view panels (cashier, trends, reports, menu manager, inventory manager, employee manager), and displays the cashier view.

      Builds the employee manager view panel for adding, updating, toggling, and deleting employee records.

      private javax.swing.JPanel buildInventoryManagerView() <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Builds the inventory manager view panel for adding, updating, and deleting inventory items with stock levels and reorder thresholds.

      Builds and returns the inventory manager view panel, which provides a table of all inventory items and buttons to add, update, and delete inventory records.

      Builds the menu manager view panel for adding, updating, deleting, toggling, and managing ingredients of menu items.

      Removes all items from the shopping cart and refreshes the display.
      =======
      Removes all items from the cart and refreshes the display.

      private void ensureMenuEnabledColumnExists()
      Some installations may not have the optional "enabled" column on the MenuItem table yet (older versions of the schema).
      private void finishTransaction()
      Completes the current order transaction.
      private void generateProductUsage​(java.lang.String start, java.lang.String end) <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Generates a product usage report for a given date range, showing total quantities of each inventory item consumed.
      =======
      Generates a product-usage report for the specified date range, showing how much of each inventory item was consumed.
      >>>>>>> Stashed changes
      private void generateSalesReport​(java.lang.String start, java.lang.String end) <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Generates a sales report for a given date range, showing quantity sold and total revenue for each menu item.
      =======
      Generates a sales report for the specified date range, showing quantity sold and revenue for each menu item.
      >>>>>>> Stashed changes
      private void generateXReport() <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Generates and displays an X-Report showing current day sales metrics including sales totals, tax collected, payment breakdowns, and hourly revenue.
      =======
      Generates and displays a current-day X-Report by querying the current_x_report_stats table.
      >>>>>>> Stashed changes
      private void generateZReport() <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Generates and displays a Z-Report (end-of-day report).
      =======
      Generates and displays an end-of-day Z-Report.
      >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      Loads all employee records from the database into the given table model.

      Loads all inventory items from the database into the given table model.

      private void loadMenuButtons​(javax.swing.JPanel grid) <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Populates the given panel with buttons for each enabled menu item.

      private void loadMenuTable​(javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel model) <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Loads all menu items from the database into the given table model.
      =======

      private void loadNextOrderId() <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Loads the next available order ID from the database by querying the maximum existing order ID and incrementing by one.
      =======
      Queries the database for the current maximum order ID and sets nextOrderId to one greater, ensuring new orders receive a unique, sequential identifier.
      >>>>>>> Stashed changes
      private void loadRecipesIntoModel​(javax.swing.table.DefaultTableModel model, int menuItemId) <<<<<<< Updated upstream
      Loads recipe (ingredient) entries for a given menu item into the table model.
      =======
      Loads all recipe entries for a given menu item into the table model, joining with inventory item data to display human-readable names.

      Executes a SQL query and loads the results into the given table model.
      =======
      Executes the given SQL query and populates a table model with the first three columns of each result row.

      • BobaShopGUI

        public BobaShopGUI()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Constructs the main Boba Shop POS window. Initializes the database connection, sets up all view panels (cashier, trends, reports, menu manager, inventory manager, employee manager), and displays the cashier view by default.
        =======
        Constructs the main POS window, initialises the database connection, builds all view panels (cashier, trends, reports, menu manager, inventory manager, employee manager), and displays the cashier view.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

    • Method Detail

      • main

        public static void main​(java.lang.String[] args)
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Application entry point. Launches the Boba Shop POS GUI on the Swing event dispatch thread.
        =======
        Application entry point. Configures the system look-and-feel and launches the POS GUI on the Swing Event Dispatch Thread.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes
        Parameters:
        args - command-line arguments (not used)

      • navigateTo

        private void navigateTo​(java.lang.String view)
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Switches the displayed view panel using the CardLayout. If navigating to the cashier view, the menu buttons are reloaded first.
        Parameters:
        view - the name of the view to display (e.g. "cashier", "trends", "reports")
        =======
        Switches the visible panel to the specified view card. If the target view is the cashier, the menu buttons are refreshed first.
        Parameters:
        view - the card name to display (e.g. "cashier", "trends")
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • initDatabase

        private void initDatabase()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Initializes the database connection using DatabaseManager. Displays an error dialog and exits the application if the connection fails.
        =======
        Establishes the database connection via DatabaseManager. If the connection fails, an error dialog is shown and the application exits.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • ensureMenuEnabledColumnExists

        private void ensureMenuEnabledColumnExists()
        Some installations may not have the optional "enabled" column on the MenuItem table yet (older versions of the schema). Before we try to reference it we check for its existence and add it with a sensible default if it is missing. This keeps the database change nonâ€‘destructive and only performed once.

      • loadNextOrderId

        private void loadNextOrderId()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Loads the next available order ID from the database by querying the maximum existing order ID and incrementing by one. Defaults to 1 if the query fails.
        =======
        Queries the database for the current maximum order ID and sets nextOrderId to one greater, ensuring new orders receive a unique, sequential identifier.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • buildCashierView

        private javax.swing.JPanel buildCashierView()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Builds the cashier order entry view panel. Contains a grid of menu item buttons on the left and a shopping cart panel on the right with total, finish transaction, and clear cart buttons.
        Returns:
        the fully constructed cashier view JPanel
        =======
        Builds and returns the cashier order view panel. This includes a scrollable grid of menu item buttons on the left and a cart summary with total, finish-transaction, and clear-cart buttons on the right.
        Returns:
        the fully-constructed cashier view JPanel
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • loadMenuButtons

        private void loadMenuButtons​(javax.swing.JPanel grid)
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Populates the given panel with buttons for each enabled menu item. Each button displays the item name and price, and adds the item to the cart when clicked.
        Parameters:
        grid - the JPanel to populate with menu item buttons
        =======
        Clears and repopulates the given grid panel with one button per enabled menu item from the database. Each button displays the item name and base price and adds the item to the cart when clicked.
        Parameters:
        grid - the panel to populate with menu-item buttons
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • addToCart

        private void addToCart​(java.lang.String name,
                       double price)
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Adds a menu item to the shopping cart. If the item already exists in the cart, its quantity is incremented; otherwise a new entry is created.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the menu item
        =======
        Adds a menu item to the cart. If the item is already present its quantity is incremented; otherwise a new BobaShopGUI.CartItem is created.
        Parameters:
        name - the display name of the menu item
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes
        price - the unit price of the menu item

      • refreshCart

        private void refreshCart()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Refreshes the cart table display and recalculates the total price based on the current items and quantities in the cart.
        =======
        Rebuilds the cart table rows and recalculates the displayed total from the current contents of the cart list.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • clearCart

        private void clearCart()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Removes all items from the shopping cart and refreshes the display.
        =======
        Removes all items from the cart and refreshes the display.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • finishTransaction

        private void finishTransaction()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Completes the current order transaction. Prompts for payment method (cash or card), inserts the order and order items into the database, deducts inventory quantities based on recipes, updates the X-report statistics, and commits the transaction. Rolls back on any error and restores the order ID.
        =======
        Completes the current order transaction. Prompts the cashier for a payment method (cash or card), then within a single database transaction: inserts the order header, inserts each order-item line, deducts inventory via recipe quantities, and updates X-report statistics. Rolls back on any failure.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

        private javax.swing.JPanel buildTrendsView()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Builds the ordering trends view panel showing hourly order volume and recent daily sales in side-by-side tables with a refresh button.
        Returns:
        the fully constructed trends view JPanel
        =======
        Builds and returns the manager trends view panel. Displays hourly and daily ordering trend tables side-by-side with a refresh button.
        Returns:
        the fully-constructed trends view JPanel
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

        Executes a SQL query and loads the results into the given table model.
        Parameters:
        model - the DefaultTableModel to populate
        sql - the SQL query to execute (must return exactly 3 columns)

        model - the table model to populate
        sql - the SQL query to execute
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

        the assembled card JPanel

        the fully-constructed reports view JPanel

      • generateXReport

        private void generateXReport()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Generates and displays an X-Report showing current day sales metrics including sales totals, tax collected, payment breakdowns, and hourly revenue.
        =======
        Generates and displays a current-day X-Report by querying the current_x_report_stats table. Shows the report in a dialog.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • generateZReport

        private void generateZReport()
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Generates and displays a Z-Report (end-of-day report). Verifies the report has not already been run today, prompts for a manager signature, displays the report, resets daily metrics to zero, and records the report in history.
        =======
        Generates and displays an end-of-day Z-Report. Validates that a Z-Report has not already been generated today, prompts for a manager signature, displays the report, resets X-report counters to zero, and records the report date in z_report_history.
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

      • generateProductUsage

        private void generateProductUsage​(java.lang.String start,
                                  java.lang.String end)
        <<<<<<< Updated upstream
        Generates a product usage report for a given date range, showing total quantities of each inventory item consumed.
        Parameters:
        start - the start date in MM/DD/YYYY format
        end - the end date in MM/DD/YYYY format
        =======
        Generates a product-usage report for the specified date range, showing how much of each inventory item was consumed. Results are displayed in the shared report table.
        Parameters:
        start - the start date in MM/DD/YYYY format
        end - the end date in MM/DD/YYYY format
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes

                                 java.lang.String end)

        start - the start date in MM/DD/YYYY format
        end - the end date in MM/DD/YYYY format
        >>>>>>> Stashed changes
